input_data.workflowName: Automated Local Audacity & Blender & Everything & Visual Studio Code Workflow
input_data.prompt_text: Design a highly resilient, local-first Windows command center plan that integrates these exact applications to complete a combined user task: Audacity, Blender, Everything, Visual Studio Code. Keep the task fully open-source, local-first, and free. Enforce costAllowed as true. Output the step-by-step PowerShell plan.

output_data.description: Design a highly resilient, local-first Windows command center plan that integrates Audacity, Blender, Everything, and Visual Studio Code to complete a combined user task: create an open-source, free project. The task must be cost-allowed.
powerShellPlan: Add-AuditdCommand -ApplicationName Audacity -ProgramPath $(Get-Item 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe')
Add-AuditdCommand -ApplicationName Blender -ProgramPath $(Get-Item 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe')
Add-EssentialsExtension -Path C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe
$audacityPackageCmdLineArgs = @(' --batch-mode', '-i', 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe', '--project', $(Get-Item 'Audacity-Blender-VSCode.yml'), --output-directory', C:	emp, '--version=1.0')
$blenderPackageCmdLineArgs = @(' --batch-mode', '-i', 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe', '--project', $(Get-Item 'Blender-Setup.yml'), '--output-directory', C:	emp, '--version=1.0')
$everythingConfigCmdLineArgs = @(' --batch-mode', '-i', 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe', '--project', $(Get-Item 'Everything-Setup.yml'), '--output-directory', C:	emp, '--version=1.0')
$vsCodePackageCmdLineArgs = @(' --batch-mode', '-i', 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe', '--project', $(Get-Item 'VSCode-Config.yml'), '--output-directory', C:	emp, '--version=1.0')
Add-AuditdCommand -ApplicationName Blender -ProgramPath $(Get-Item 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe')
Add-EssentialsExtension -Path C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe
Add-AuditdCommand -ApplicationName Visual Studio Code -ProgramPath $(Get-Item 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe')
Add-AuditdCommand -ApplicationName Audacity -ProgramPath $(Get-Item 'C: in sx-win32 in sx.exe')
